reachability_artifacts: sworn lint touchpoints S01-test test-undeclared (exit 1, undeclared)
sworn lint touchpoints S01-test test-collision (exit 1, collision)
sworn lint touchpoints S01-test test-clean (exit 0, clean)

design_decisions.choice: Parse back-ticked file/package references from spec.md sections '## In scope' and '## Planned touchpoints' only, not design.md or other sections. Section-scoping eliminates false positives from Out-of-scope, Risk, and Required-tests sections.
design_decisions.rationale: Spec is the binding contract; section-scoping fixes the critical Pin #1 where full-scan extraction caused false positives on S30's own spec (cmd/sworn/main.go, internal/foo/bar.go, etc.).

design_decisions.choice: File-reference extraction uses a regex on back-ticked tokens that contain '/' or end in .go/.ts/.tsx/.md, extracted from In-scope + Planned-touchpoints sections only.
design_decisions.rationale: Mirrors how specs name files; avoids matching prose back-ticks like 'sworn' or 'planned_files'. Package refs like 'internal/lint' are covered by the '/' matcher.

design_decisions.choice: Touchpoint matrix parsing reads the markdown table under '### Touchpoint matrix' in index.md. Extracts file/surface column and ✓ marks per track column. Files with ✓ in multiple non-sequential-serialised columns without DOCUMENTED SHARED annotation are collisions.
design_decisions.rationale: Matrix is the authoritative touchpoint registry for the release; the parser flags raw multi-✓ rows without DOCUMENTED SHARED annotation.

design_decisions.choice: Migration number detection scans planned_files for a 6-digit prefix pattern (NNNNNN_) across the release. Two slices sharing the same prefix → collision violation.
design_decisions.rationale: Simple string-prefix check, not a database introspection; migration number uniqueness is a hard invariant.

design_decisions.choice: DOCUMENTED SHARED files that appear in the slice's planned_files are reported as an informational note (not a fail-closed violation). Non-additive edit detection from design prose is a Rule 2 deferral — too fuzzy for a reliable gate.
design_decisions.rationale: Coach accepted the informational-note substitution for the spec's additive-invariant check (Pin #3 escalate). Prose-based 'non-additive vs additive' detection is deferred as a Rule 2 open_deferral. The informational note surfaces shared files so the Coach can make the coordination decision at plan time.
